name: anthropic.messages.create
description: Anthropic-specific: the system prompt lives at top-level `system` (not in the messages array). It can be a string OR an array of text blocks (the array form is used for prompt caching). Renderer must show the system content above the conversation, not lose it.

input.system: You are a Maple Ridge concierge. Be warm and concise.

messages.content: Where do I drop off the rent?

content.text: You can drop it at the front desk between 9am and 6pm, or use the after-hours slot to the right of the door.
